# SmartPT Documentation

SmartPT documentation covers SmartPT Core, JIT Access, and AD Control for on-prem Local Active Directory environments.

Primary site: https://docs.smartpt.co.il/
Company site: https://smartpt.co.il/

Key documentation areas:
- SmartPT Core installation, SmartPT Console, licensing, shared 2FA reset, product status, and root RBAC.
- JIT Access roles, assignments, eligible activation, OTP verification, active sessions, and automatic removal from Active Directory groups.
- AD Control tiered helpdesk operations, password reset, account unlock, OTP verification, temporary password delivery, protected users, protected groups, and Tier 0 protection.
- Audit logs, troubleshooting, shared security model, MFA recovery, privacy, terms, cookie policy, and accessibility statement.

This static documentation site does not require login and does not include analytics or advertising tracking scripts.
